body_txt: So, there's this character that seems to have a few screws loose. They always seem to do things so off-the-wall and insane that you know they're crazy... ... And they're so cool . Yep, this is for characters whose craziness makes them seem cool. In this context, "crazy" doesn't mean clinically insane. Rather, it means that they don't act like how a normal person would act, which could be due to actual insanity, intense eccentricity, or by being just plain bizarre. If a character is well-liked because of mild quirkiness, then they're Adorkable . Do not confuse with Success Through Insanity , which is for characters whose madness is essential to the task at hand.
